I thought it was just a slimming tank top… but the Lumoria™ 2.0 genuinely surprised me. Posture straightened, belly compressed, instant visual effect. My girlfriend says I've lost weight — and honestly, my waistline has slimmed down since I started wearing it every day. It's not just a piece of clothing, it's a game changer.

Unlike regular compression shirts that simply squeeze, our patented Ionic Ice™ technology creates a completely different mechanism — one that no other brand can legally replicate.
🔬 Zoned 3D Compression
🏥 Clinically Tested
💎 80% Nylon, 20% Elastane
❄️ Thermo-Active Fibers
The strategic placement of compression zones targets the belly, chest and back — not a random pattern. Each zone is designed to create support points that activate with every movement.

This isn't fashion dressed up as science. It's clinically tested technology, now protected by a worldwide patent.
A bloated belly and poor posture aren't just a weight problem — it's a problem of support and circulation. Here's what our technology does differently:
1
Targeted 3D Compression — Strategic compression zones hold in the belly, straighten the back and open the shoulders. No passive compression — active support all day long.
2
+30% Circulation Boost — Targeted compression increases blood flow, helping your body naturally flush out toxins and fluids that cause bloating and heaviness.
3
Thermogenic Effect — Ionic Ice™ fibers create micro thermal activity that helps burn more calories during your normal daily activities.

The timeline: Within 24h, you feel straighter. Within 1 week, your clothes fit better. Within 30 days, people ask what you've changed.
We know you've already tried things that didn't work. That's exactly why we made this simple:
Try it for 90 full days. If you don't feel straighter, more confident, and if you're not putting it on every morning — we'll give you a full refund. No questions. No hassle.
Free returns — we even cover the return shipping costs.
Instant support — real humans, not bots. Write to us anytime.
+32,300 satisfied customers — less than 2% returns.

We take the risk so you don't have to. You love it or you pay nothing.
FREE Shipping on all orders — no minimum, no code.
Processing: 24 business hours
Delivery time: All orders typically arrive within 5 to 8 business days anywhere in the world. The majority of packages land well before the 8-day window, but we quote the longer timeframe to stay on the safe side.
Tracking included — you receive a tracking number by email as soon as your order ships.

For any questions about sizing or exchanges: contact@getlumoria.com

FAQ

Who is Lumoria for?

Lumoria users are people who want to lose weight, build confidence, improve their posture, gain more energy, and look more toned every day.

How does the Lumoria undershirt work?

Lumoria is made with a high-performance fabric that naturally stimulates the body. Its mineral fibers boost circulation, help you feel more energized, and improve posture. Worn regularly, it slims the silhouette and enhances overall wellbeing.

How long before I see a difference?

Results vary, but most users notice a visible improvement within 30 days. For best results, wear it daily and maintain a healthy lifestyle.

What if the size doesn't fit?

No worries. If the size doesn't work, contact us at contact@getlumoria.com and we'll arrange an exchange.

What are the shipping times?

Orders are processed within 24 hours.

We offer free delivery within 5 to 8 business days across the US, UK, Canada, Australia, New Zealand and Ireland. Most orders arrive before the 8-business-day mark, but we prefer to give a safe estimate just in case.

A tracking number will be sent to you by email once your order is shipped.

Is Lumoria machine washable?

Yes, but we recommend washing on a cold/gentle cycle to preserve the fabric and compression.

What is Lumoria made of?

80% nylon — 20% spandex.

Didn't find your answer?

We'd be happy to help you here.
